title: Water Storage Readiness
summary: Use deterministic water and population metrics to decide whether to build more tanks.
promptGuidelines: Always call timberborn_water_readiness before giving water-to-population advice.
Use the returned waterPerBeaver, waterCapacityPerBeaver, and daysOfWater values directly.
Recommend water_tank placement when daysOfWater is low or capacity per beaver is thin.
Before placing a tank, show a four-button confirmation menu with yes and no choices.

starterMenu.question: What water check should Pi run?
